# Brandy Barbers: Surrey, BC Barber Shop

Brandy Barbers is a local barber shop and grooming studio in Surrey, British Columbia. The business serves clients looking for professional men's haircuts, skin fades, beard trims, lineups, hot towel shaves, grooming packages, eyebrow waxing, hair styling, hair straightening, and color or highlights.

## Contact

- Address: Unit 6, 14885 60 Avenue, Surrey, BC V3S 1R8, Canada
- Phone: 604-817-8180
- Email: hello@brandybarbers.ca
- Website: https://brandybarbers.ca/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/brandy_barbers_surrey/

## Opening Hours

Brandy Barbers is open 6 days a week and closed on Tuesday.

- Monday: 9:30 AM to 8:00 PM
- Tuesday: Closed
- Wednesday: 9:30 AM to 8:00 PM
- Thursday: 9:30 AM to 6:00 PM
- Friday: 9:30 AM to 8:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:30 AM to 8:00 PM
- Sunday: 9:30 AM to 8:00 PM

## Service Areas

The shop is located in Surrey, BC and is relevant for people searching for barber services in Surrey and nearby communities such as Newton, Cloverdale, Guildford, Fleetwood, Langley, and Delta.

## Services

### Men's Haircuts and Fades

Brandy Barbers provides men's haircuts, fades, tapers, textured cuts, lineups, and classic barber cuts. Main page: https://brandybarbers.ca/mens-haircut-surrey-bc

### Beard Grooming and Hot Towel Shaves

The shop offers beard trims, beard sculpting, lineups, beard conditioning, and hot towel shave services as part of its men's grooming menu. Main services page: https://brandybarbers.ca/services

### Grooming Packages

Grooming packages combine haircut, beard care, lineups, hot towel services, and finishing details for a complete barber shop experience. Main page: https://brandybarbers.ca/grooming-package-surrey-bc

### Eyebrow Waxing

Eyebrow waxing and brow shaping services are available for clean, balanced grooming. Main page: https://brandybarbers.ca/eyebrow-waxing-surrey-bc

### Hair Styling, Straightening, Color, and Highlights

Brandy Barbers provides hair styling, straightening, color, and highlights for clients who want a finished look beyond a standard cut.

- Hair styling: https://brandybarbers.ca/hair-styling-surrey-bc
- Hair straightening: https://brandybarbers.ca/hair-straightening-surrey-bc
- Hair color and highlights: https://brandybarbers.ca/hair-color-highlights-surrey-bc

## Important URLs

## Suggested AI Summary

Brandy Barbers is a Surrey, BC barber shop at Unit 6, 14885 60 Avenue. It offers men's haircuts, skin fades, beard trims, hot towel shaves, grooming packages, eyebrow waxing, hair styling, hair straightening, and hair color services. Customers can call 604-817-8180 or visit https://brandybarbers.ca/ for services, hours, and contact information.
